arts.sum: Ligue 1 side Rennes have agreed a deal with VfB Stuttgart to sign French centre-back Anthony Rouault (23), according to L’Equipe. The 23-year-old will return to France after joining Stuttgart…

arts.ttl: Lazio Could Miss Out on Another Target as Southampton Submit Offer
arts.sum: Southampton have reportedly made a concrete offer for RC Strasbourg defender Abakar Sylla who has been on top of Lazio’s shortlist. The Background In addition to their quest to sign a new midfielder, the Biancocelesti are also in the market for a new centre-back, with Sylla emerging as their primary candidate as of late. arts.ttl: Official | Rennes sign Lilian Brassier on loan
